title: Queen of the Mob
writer: Horace McCoy, William R. Lipman, J. Edgar Hoover
actors: Ralph Bellamy, Blanche Yurka, J. Carrol Naish
plot: Mobster Ma Webster rules her clan with an iron hand, taking charge of all their robberies despite the protests of George Frost, the only member of her gang who is not her son. On Christmas Eve, Ma, George, and her sons Eddie, Char...
